stemHtml: The crew of a jet aircraft, approaching to the destination airport, is informed that a holding procedure is expected, because of high traffic. What action should be taken by the crew to increase the maximum endurance?

options.a: Cruise with V<sub>MD</sub> in order to minimise the fuel flow.
options.b: Cruise with V<sub>MAX RANGE</sub> in order to increase the fuel mileage.
options.c: Climb to the optimum altitude in order to increase specific range.
options.d: Request a continuous descent in order to reduce the thrust setting.
